public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as coast broker.
manner: Treats exchange as a social instrument as much as an economic one, reading appetite and hesitation alike. In The Principalities, that reads as someone protocol-aware and boundary-sensitive, carrying overlapping laws, noble expectations, and shared imperial strain, and the habits of a coast broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of coast broker in and around Frozen Quagmires, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Frozen Quagmires workable through the obligations of coast broker while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry in The Principalities.
hidden_pressure: Must read timing, trust, and supply pressure early enough that a market problem does not become a civic one. Around Frozen Quagmires, that usually means carrying house rivalry, guild legitimacy versus aristocratic legitimacy, magic restriction conflict without letting the role of coast broker visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Pela Field can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.
Pela Field will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Pela Field read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Frozen Quagmires: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Coast Broker, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in The Principalities.
what_they_refuse: Pela Field refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Coast Broker too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Pela Field can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Pela Field adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
